analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet criticizes French police for using excessive force against allegedly peaceful protesters, contrasts it with Russia’s #navalnyprotests by implying Western double standards, and quotes a Russian commentator hoping Western media/politicians will pay attention. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent): The tweet accuses a Western country (France) of unjustified force against peaceful protesters and highlights 'DoubleStandards', portraying the West as hypocritical and hostile toward civil dissent. This aligns with RU1’s depiction of the West as immoral/hostile and Russia as a victim of Western double standards. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Not promoted; no mention of alternative systems or multilateralism. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): Not present. RU4 (Russian history is admirable): Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): Not relevant. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
